stem: A pitcher contains 32 ounces of juice. When uncovered, the amount of juice decreases by 1 ounce every 5 days. If 18 ounces of juice remain in the pitcher, for how many days has it been uncovered?
rationale: The pitcher has lost 32 - 18 = 14 ounces. Each ounce lost takes 5 days, so the time uncovered is 14 × 5 = 70 days. Choice B is correct.
